mapper.select: SELECT * FROM feedback ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM feedback ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM feedback WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM feedback WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (user_id, username, email, type, title, content, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{email}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE feedback SET type = #{type}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, reply = #{reply}, reply_time = #{replyTime}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE feedback SET reply = #{reply}, status = #{status}, reply_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE status = #{status}
